name: Employee Performance
query:
SELECT
    `tabEmployee`.`name` AS "Employee ID:Data:120",
    `tabEmployee`.`employee_name` AS "Employee Name:Data:200",
    `tabEmployee`.`designation` AS "Designation:Data:150",
    `tabEmployee`.`branch` AS "Branch:Link/Branch:120",
    COALESCE(`tabEmployee`.`custom_hours_logged_30d`, 0) AS "Hours Logged (30d):Float:100",
    COALESCE(`tabEmployee`.`custom_tasks_completed_30d`, 0) AS "Tasks Completed (30d):Int:100",
    COALESCE(`tabEmployee`.`custom_active_assignments`, 0) AS "Active Assignments:Int:100",
    COALESCE(`tabEmployee`.`custom_sla_compliance_rate`, 100) AS "SLA Compliance Rate (%):Percent:120",
    COALESCE(`tabEmployee`.`custom_utilization_rate_30d`, 0) AS "Utilization Rate (%):Percent:120"
FROM
    `tabEmployee`
WHERE
    `tabEmployee`.`status` = 'Active'
    AND `tabEmployee`.`employee_name` IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    `tabEmployee`.`custom_hours_logged_30d` DESC
